---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with a template, example, or documentation
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

## Which template or doc?

Name the file and where it is in the repo.

## What's wrong?

Describe the problem clearly. If it's a broken link, missing section, or incorrect instruction, quote the text that is wrong.

## What should it say or do instead?

If you know the fix, suggest it. If not, describe the expected behaviour.

## Additional context

- Agent you use (Codex CLI, Claude Code, Aider, etc.)
- Any screenshots or copy-paste of the issue
